name_en: 🥇🥇Original M46784 Monogram Fanny Pack. This high-rise bag is made of Montage coated canvas, with details like a movable nameplate on natural cowhide. The detachable textile strap adds a touch of movement. The soft canvas feels soft to the touch, while the ultra-thin design allows it to be worn under clothes. Dimensions: 38×16×8cm.
